name: get_business_hours
description:
Get opening hours for a specific business by day of the week.

USE WHEN:
- User asks "are they open right now?", "what time do they close?"
- User needs to know hours for a specific day: "open on Sunday?"
- Planning a visit and needs schedule info

DO NOT USE WHEN:
- You already have hours from get_

name: get_business_services
description:
Get the list of services offered by a business, with prices and duration when available.

USE WHEN:
- User asks "how much does X cost?", "what services do they offer?"
- Comparing prices between businesses
- User needs to know duration of a service

DO NOT USE WHEN:
- You already have services from

name: get_business_faqs
description:
Get the owner-approved FAQs (frequently asked questions with answers) for a business.

USE WHEN:
- User asks a specific question about a business that an FAQ might answer ("do they take walk-ins?", "is parking available?", "do they speak English?")
- You want authoritative, business-approved answers

name: contact_business
description:
Get all contact information and actionable capabilities for a business. Best way to help a user reach out to a business.

USE WHEN:
- User wants to contact, call, message, or book with a business
- User says "how do I reach them?", "can I WhatsApp them?"
- You need the direct action URLs (WhatsApp l

name: list_verticals
description:
List all available business verticals (categories) with the count of businesses in each.

USE WHEN:
- User asks "what types of businesses do you have?"
- User is exploring: "what can I find on Plexa?"
- You need to know which verticals are available before searching
- User uses a category you're not

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_businesses, get_business, contact_business · Private data: search_businesses, get_business, contact_business · Public sink: get_business, contact_business · Destructive: get_business_hours.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_businesses, get_business, contact_business · Private data: search_businesses, get_business, contact_business · Public sink: get_business, contact_business · Destructive: get_business_hours

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
